---
title: "SUVR Estimation Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 2
    code_folding: hide
params:
  cores: 1
  model_number: "Model 1"
  analysis_folder: NULL
  bids_dir: NULL
  blood_dir: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(jsonlite)
library(glue)

analysis_folder <- params$analysis_folder
model_number <- params$model_number

config_path <- file.path(analysis_folder, "desc-petfitoptions_config.json")
config <- NULL
if (file.exists(config_path)) {
  config <- jsonlite::fromJSON(config_path)
  config <- coerce_bounds_numeric(config)
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
desc <- str_remove(str_to_lower(model_number), " ")
oldfiles <- list.files(analysis_folder, pattern = desc, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
file.remove(oldfiles)
```

This report estimates standardized uptake value ratio (SUVR) from target and reference TACs in a user-defined time window.

# Analysis Configuration

**Model:** `r params$model_number` - SUVR

**Analysis folder:** `r params$analysis_folder`

**Generated on:** `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")`

```{r model-config}
model_config <- NULL
if (!is.null(config$Models)) {
  if (params$model_number == "Model 1") {
    model_config <- config$Models$Model1
  } else if (params$model_number == "Model 2") {
    model_config <- config$Models$Model2
  } else if (params$model_number == "Model 3") {
    model_config <- config$Models$Model3
  }
}

if (is.null(model_config) || model_config$type != "SUVR") {
  cat("Invalid or missing SUVR configuration.")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}

suvr_start <- model_config$suvr_start %||% 40
suvr_end <- model_config$suvr_end %||% 60

config_df <- tibble(
  Parameter = c("Model Type", "SUVR Window Start (min)", "SUVR Window End (min)"),
  Value = c("SUVR", suvr_start, suvr_end)
)

kable(config_df, caption = "SUVR Configuration")
```

# Loading Data

```{r load-data}
tacs_files <- list.files(analysis_folder,
  pattern = "*_desc-targetregions_tacs.tsv",
  recursive = TRUE
)

ref_files <- list.files(analysis_folder,
  pattern = "*_desc-ref_tacs.tsv",
  recursive = TRUE
)

if (length(tacs_files) == 0 || length(ref_files) == 0) {
  stop("Required TAC files not found in analysis folder.")
}

tac_data <- tibble(filename = tacs_files) %>%
  mutate(basename = basename(filename)) %>%
  mutate(attributes = map(filename, kinfitr:::bids_filename_attributes)) %>%
  unnest(attributes) %>%
  group_by(filename) %>%
  mutate(tacs = map(filename, ~ read_tsv(file.path(analysis_folder, .x), show_col_types = FALSE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  unnest(tacs) %>%
  select(-basename, -measurement, -desc) %>%
  rename(target_tac = tac)

ref_data <- tibble(filename = ref_files) %>%
  mutate(basename = basename(filename)) %>%
  mutate(attributes = map(filename, kinfitr:::bids_filename_attributes)) %>%
  unnest(attributes) %>%
  group_by(filename) %>%
  mutate(tacs = map(filename, ~ read_tsv(file.path(analysis_folder, .x), show_col_types = FALSE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  unnest(tacs) %>%
  select(-basename, -measurement, -desc, -filename, -volume_mm3) %>%
  rename(reference_tac = tac)

model_data <- tac_data %>%
  inner_join(ref_data,
    by = intersect(colnames(tac_data), colnames(ref_data))
  )
```

# SUVR Estimation

```{r estimate-suvr}
group_cols <- intersect(
  c("sub", "ses", "trc", "rec", "task", "run", "pet", "region"),
  colnames(model_data)
)

suvr_results <- model_data %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(group_cols))) %>%
  summarise(
    n_frames_in_window = sum(frame_mid / 60 >= suvr_start & frame_mid / 60 <= suvr_end),
    target_mean = {
      idx <- frame_mid / 60 >= suvr_start & frame_mid / 60 <= suvr_end
      if (!any(idx)) NA_real_ else weighted.mean(target_tac[idx], frame_dur[idx], na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    reference_mean = {
      idx <- frame_mid / 60 >= suvr_start & frame_mid / 60 <= suvr_end
      if (!any(idx)) NA_real_ else weighted.mean(reference_tac[idx], frame_dur[idx], na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    SUVR = target_mean / reference_mean,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    suvr_start_min = suvr_start,
    suvr_end_min = suvr_end
  )

kable(head(suvr_results, 20), caption = "SUVR Estimates (first 20 rows)")
```

# Saving Parameters

```{r save-outputs}
write_tsv(
  suvr_results,
  file = paste0(
    analysis_folder, "/",
    "model_", "SUVR", "_",
    "desc-", desc, "_",
    "kinpar.tsv"
  )
)

folder_data <- tibble(filename = tacs_files) %>%
  mutate(basename = basename(filename)) %>%
  mutate(attributes = map(filename, kinfitr:::bids_filename_attributes)) %>%
  unnest(attributes) %>%
  mutate(dirname = dirname(filename)) %>%
  select(-filename, -basename, -measurement, -desc)

savepar_pet <- suvr_results %>%
  group_by(across(intersect(colnames(.), c("sub", "ses", "trc", "rec", "task", "run", "pet")))) %>%
  nest(.key = "kinpars") %>%
  inner_join(folder_data) %>%
  mutate(filename = paste0(
    analysis_folder, "/", dirname, "/", pet, "_",
    "model_", "SUVR", "_",
    "desc-", desc, "_",
    "kinpar.tsv"
  ))

walk2(savepar_pet$kinpars, savepar_pet$filename, ~ write_tsv(.x, .y))

savepar_pet <- savepar_pet %>%
  group_by(pet) %>%
  mutate(jsondat = map(kinpars, ~ list(
    Description = "Standardized Uptake Value Ratio (SUVR) estimate.",
    ModelName = "SUVR",
    AdditionalModelDetails = str_glue("SUVR computed from average uptake in {suvr_start}-{suvr_end} min window."),
    SUVR = "Target region mean uptake divided by reference region mean uptake.",
    target_mean = "Duration-weighted mean target uptake in the SUVR window.",
    reference_mean = "Duration-weighted mean reference uptake in the SUVR window."
  ))) %>%
  mutate(jsondat = jsonlite::toJSON(jsondat, pretty = TRUE, auto_unbox = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(filename_json = str_replace(filename, ".tsv", ".json"))

walk2(savepar_pet$jsondat, savepar_pet$filename_json, ~ writeLines(.x, .y))
```

# Session Information

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
